_patch_meta.governing_instruction: auto-generated from STEP morphology classification (OSHB OSHM + SBLG_th Robinson schemes); Tier 1 cohort = pronoun/particle/preposition/conjunction/interjection/article/suffix; adverb excluded as Tier 2.
_patch_meta.description: Auto set-aside of 2191 verse_context rows whose OWNER Strong's is classified by STEP morphology as grammatical noise. Per-row notes carry the audit trail 'auto_pos_noise:{pos}|case_{A|B|C}|2026-05-03'. Case A = verse retained in registry via content term (48 rows); Case B = verse covered in other registries (1928 rows); Case C = verse has no content-POS Strong's anywhere (215 rows). set_aside_reason='no_inner_being' (controlled vocab). is_anchor and is_relevant cleared; group_id nulled.
